description_long: This is a muscular adult male with a heavily tattooed upper body and arms, standing upright. He has a distinctive mohawk hairstyle and is shirtless, revealing detailed tattoos across his chest, arms, and back. He wears dark cargo pants with a side pocket and tall, rugged boots suitable for urban environments. A yellow armband covers his left forearm, and he has a necklace with a pendant around his neck. His facial features are sharp, and he has a confident, assertive expression, making him stand out in a crowd. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise, urban character with a bold and edgy style.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male with a mohawk, shirtless, wearing cargo pants, boots, a yellow armband, and a necklace. His urban, edgy style and confident stance make him visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mohawk, facial tattoos, necklace, chest tattoos, and yellow armband on the left forearm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the mohawk, tattoos on the arm, and the yellow armband's full length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back tattoos, open back, and the fit of the cargo pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the back tattoos, side of the face, and the yellow armband partially.
attribute_clothing_type: cargo pants, tall boots, armband, necklace
